name: chave-mestra-alquimista
description: PROACTIVELY activate for: 1. User says 'escreve uma copy', 'calibra essa copy', 'pergaminho de copy', 'Copy 3x5'; 2. User needs to diagnose the consciousness level (N1 to N5) of their audience before writing; 3. User says 'Método Carga', 'qual carga usar', 'nível de consciência N1/N2/N3/N4/N5'; 4. User wants to improve, refine, or calibrate any marketing text: headline, VSL, email, caption, sales page; 5. User says 'melhora esse texto', 'copy para [peça/canal]', 'reescreve com mais carga'; 6. User needs to choose between Pergaminho Branco (direct), Preto (provocative), or Dourado (transformation narrative); 7. Any request to write persuasive copy anchored in real rhetoric — not generic copywriting.
